sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89240" key="prosepirrofe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-ρροφέω</orth>, <sense id="n89240.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gulp down in addition</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:17:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
